Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: M25
Moving Castle Mace

When attacking, has a 40% chance of stunning an enemy for 3 sec.
Once in a while, the unit throws a mace at a random enemy unit. The mace bounces up to 4 times. On hit, it petrifies the target for 4 sec. The target takes 45% more damage and can't move. The mace also deals pure damage equal to 30% of the target's max health and heals the mace owner for 90% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Autumn Festival 2025

Sage bot code: M25

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
